titlestmt.author: Compiled by L. Wodehouse, P. McCray

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2021-12-24 18:30:59 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.physdesc: Drawings, maps, negatives, manuscripts, reports, brochures.
did.abstract: Copies of sketches, planting plans, maps, and general plans of gardens, parks, private estates, and portions of cities with material from various firms. Also "Ancestral Register of Frederick Law Olmsted, c. 1592-1878," and reports and brochures dealing with Olmsted.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Copies of sketches, planting plans, maps, and general plans of gardens, parks, private estates, and portions of cities in Chicago, Boston, Long Island, Massachusetts, New York, Pennsylvania, and other places, with material from various firms, including Olmsted, Olmsted, and Eliot; F. L. Olmsted and Co.; F. L. and J. C. Olmsted; and Olmsted Brothers - Landscape Architects, run by Frederick Law Olmsted, Jr. and John Charles Olmsted;"Ancestral Register of Frederick Law Olmsted, c. 1592-1878," and reports and brochures dealing with Olmsted. All materials relating to Roland Park in Baltimore, Maryland has been transferred to the Special Collections at Johns Hopkins University.

odd.head: General
odd.p: Items related to Roland Park in Baltimore, Maryland that were part of this collection have been transferred to the Special Collections at Johns Hopkins University.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Frederick Law Olmsted architectural drawings and plans, #462. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

did.unittitle: Series I. Olmsted Collection of Drawings (Listed by City)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Most likely not by F. L. Olmsted

did.unittitle: Parkway: Jamaica Park to Frankl Park
Parkway: Muddy River Gatehouse & Jamaica Park

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: (Other Parks of Chicago without name of landscape architect in drawer marked Landscape Architects - General)
